# Source imports "fmt" as f; sink declares var f at package level.
# Expect: non-zero exit, stderr names the alias, files unchanged.
cp src.go src_before.go
cp sink/sink.go sink_before.go
! exec sflit -source src.go -sink sink/sink.go -regex '^Foo$' -move
stderr 'package level'
cmp src.go src_before.go
cmp sink/sink.go sink_before.go

-- src.go --
package p

import f "fmt"

func Foo() { f.Println("hello") }
-- sink/sink.go --
package p

var f = 1

func Bar() {}
